data_flow_pipeline.entry_point: User invokes bat CLI -> main() in src/bin/bat/main.rs parses command-line arguments via clap and creates Config struct -> run() function orchestrates the entire pipeline

stages.responsibility: Parse command-line arguments, determine input sources, validate input parameters
stages.input: Command-line arguments, environment variables, config files
stages.output: Config struct with user preferences, Input/InputReader objects

stages.responsibility: Load syntax definitions and color themes from embedded resources or cache, detect file syntax
stages.input: File paths, file content, theme/syntax names from Config
stages.output: HighlightingAssets containing SyntaxSet and ThemeSet, detected Syntax

stages.responsibility: Resolve all user-facing options: output style components, line ranges, wrapping mode, paging mode
stages.output: Fully resolved Config with StyleComponents, LineRanges, OutputType, PagingMode

stages.responsibility: Read file content, handle encoding detection, normalize line endings, expand tabs
stages.input: InputReader with file handle or stdin
stages.output: Raw file content decoded to String with preprocessing applied

stages.responsibility: Tokenize source code, apply syntax rules, generate syntax highlighting regions
stages.output: Array of (byte_range, Style) tuples representing highlighted regions

stages.responsibility: Process each line: apply decorations, handle wrapping, apply ANSI escape sequences, render with syntax colors
stages.input: File content lines, highlighting regions, Config
stages.output: Formatted line strings with ANSI escape codes

stages.responsibility: Route output to stdout, pager, or file; handle terminal capabilities; manage pager subprocess
stages.output: Terminal output or pager input stream

data_flow_pipeline.exit_point: Output is written to terminal via stdout or piped to external pager (less/more)

config.rs.role: Converts CLI arguments into Config struct

vscreen.rs.role: ANSI escape sequence parsing and manipulation

cross_module_interactions.interaction: Parses CLI arguments into clap matches
Delegates file reading and printing to Controller
cross_module_interactions.data_passed: Config, HighlightingAssets, Input list -> prints to output

cross_module_interactions.interaction: Opens files and reads content line-by-line
Detects syntax for input file and retrieves theme
Prints formatted lines with syntax highlighting
cross_module_interactions.data_passed: File content, Syntax, Theme, Config -> formatted ANSI strings

cross_module_interactions.interaction: Routes output to stdout or pager
Parses and tracks ANSI escape sequences
Generates line number and diff marker decorations
cross_module_interactions.data_passed: Line number, git diff info -> decoration strings

cross_module_interactions.interaction: Determines which style components to render
Parses ANSI sequences to strip them
Reads file content for syntax detection
cross_module_interactions.data_passed: File path -> InputReader -> first line bytes

extension_proposal.feature: Custom output format support (HTML, Markdown, JSON with syntax regions)
required_changes: Create output_formatter.rs module with trait-based formatters
Modify printer.rs to collect highlighting regions into intermediate representation
Add OutputFormatter implementations for each format
integration_points: After syntax highlighting and before output handling: insert formatting stage
OutputType routes to formatter instead of direct pager/stdout
Decorations adapted per-format (HTML spans, Markdown backticks)
